message:
feat(web): add skeleton loader to SequenceView

Implements phage_explorer-7hlh - adds premium loading skeleton to
SequenceView component for better perceived performance.

## Changes
- Import SequenceViewSkeleton from ui/Skeleton
- Add showLoadingSkeleton state to track loading phase
- Show skeleton on initial mount when no sequence is loaded
- Transition to "No sequence loaded" after 2 second timeout
- Immediate transition to content when sequence arrives

## User Experience
- Users see animated skeleton grid instead of blank/static text
- Skeleton matches actual sequence view layout (rows, gene map)
- Smooth transition from skeleton -> content or empty state
- Proper ARIA attributes for accessibility (aria-busy, aria-label)

## Loading Flow
1. Component mounts with no sequence -> show skeleton
2. Sequence arrives -> immediately hide skeleton, show content
3. No sequence after 2s timeout -> show "No sequence loaded"
